questions.question: Design a 4-bit full adder using basic gates. Show the circuit diagram and explain the logic behind it. (15 marks)
questions.hint: Use AND, OR, and NOT gates to implement the circuit.

questions.question: Design a 4-bit full subtractor using basic gates. Show the circuit diagram and explain the logic behind it. (15 marks)
questions.hint: Use AND, OR, and NOT gates to implement the circuit.

questions.question: A 4-bit binary number 1010 is added to 0001. Using your full adder design, calculate the result and show the carry output. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Use truth tables to validate your results.
